question: If a scene satisfies: ①There are two people in the scene, ②the woman is looking at the man, and ③a bright lamp is to the rear-left of the man. In what direction is the microphone relative to the man?
In one shot: ①The man is facing the TV, and ②there is a chair behind the man. How many TVs are there in this shot?
In one shot: ①There is a desk lamp, and ②there is a person. ③The walkie-talkie is to the left of the desk lamp. What does the person in the frame look like?
answer_choice_1: A woman with long blonde hair

question: In one shot: ①A woman is standing leaning against the door, and ②she is wearing black clothes. ③On the table behind her, how many white glass cups are there?
In one shot: ①Everyone is sitting at the table, and a person satisfies: ②She has long blonde hair, and ③the person sitting to her right is male. What color clothes is the person to her left wearing?

In one shot: ①There are two people, ②the person in yellow is standing to the right of the person in black (relative to the person in black), and ③there is a banana on the table behind the person in yellow. What is the woman holding in her hands?
A scene satisfies: ①There is only one person in the shot, ②the wall is green, and ③there is no window behind the person in the shot. How many chairs are there behind this person?
①In one scene, the woman in white sweeps her hair. ②The moment she sweeps her hair, what is the main color of the painting to her front-right?
①In one shot, a woman is looking at a man, and ②they are on two sides of a wall. ③At this time, on the cabinet to the man's left, what is the color of the rightmost object?

①In the scene where everyone is sitting at the dining table eating, ②if a person stands at the position of the grandmother in blue clothes, and ③faces the clock on the wall, in what direction is the person in green clothes relative to them?

①In one scene, the person in blue clothes is carried by two people. ②The person his left arm rests on is Person A, and ③the color of Person A's pants is close to the color of Person B's top. When playing cards, what is the clothing color of the person to the right of Person B (relative to Person B)?

①In one scene, a person is being carried over a railing by two other people, and ②they pass by a grey car. ③If a person stands in front of the railing facing it, in what direction is the grey car relative to them?

①In one scene, a woman in red leans against a car. ②The color of this car is A. ③In another scene shown to you, several objects of color A are placed on the top shelf. How many such objects are there?
A chair satisfies: ①It is red, ②it has a cushion, and ③it is closer to the house entrance. ④If a person sits on this chair, in what direction is the white Chinese painting relative to them?
In one scene: ①A woman is sitting, and ②there is a green plant in the frame. ③There is an object on the wall to the right of that woman. What color is it?
A chair satisfies: ①It is made of wood, ②it has a backrest, and ③it is not red. ④If a person sits on this chair, in what direction is the white traditional Chinese painting relative to them?
①In one scene, the woman is holding money in her hand, and ②the man is looking at her. At this moment, in what direction is the floor lamp relative to the woman?

①In one scene, a person wearing a white hat is drinking a beverage with a straw. ②At this time, the person wearing a black suit in the shot is Person A, and ③another person wearing a tall white hat and ④glasses is Person B. In what direction is Person B relative to Person A?

A shot satisfies: ①A woman and a man are arguing, ②the man breaks something, and ③there is a chair in the bottom right corner of the frame. What is the color of the background in the shot at this time?

①In one shot, a woman walks out of the room, and ②then immediately walks back in. ③When they walk out of the room for the second time, at the exact moment of stepping out the door, in what direction is the room door the woman walked out of the first time relative to them?
①In one scene, a car drives into the parking garage. ②In the shot, there are many blue signs. ③At this time, relative to the right side of this car, how many blue signs are there?
①In one scene, a person brings something to another person, and ②both of them are startled and scream. ③What is the clothing color of the person on the left side of the frame?
①In one scene, a person hides in the bathtub. ②There is a candle near the wall. ③If a person stands in the bathtub facing the candle, in what direction is the painting in the room relative to them?

①In one shot, a woman is talking to a man, and ②the man is in a hurry to leave. ③The background colors on the left and right sides of the woman's head are different. From the perspective of the camera, what is the background color on the right side of the woman's head?
①There is a person in purple clothes in the shot, and ②he is followed by two people serving him. ③When the person in purple sits down on the chair, what is the hat color of the person closest to him?
